message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# UI Enhancement Plan: Productivity Platform Aesthetic

## Context
The modular apartment planner has a functional but generic UI (Inter font, standard blue accent, flat white/gray surfaces). The goal is to elevate it to a polished productivity platform feel — simple, calm, and professional — without changing any behavior. Think Linear/Figma-level polish for an architectural tool.

## Design Direction
**Architectural Precision Meets Modern Craft.** Warm-neutral palette, distinctive typography, teal accent color (evokes architectural patina), subtle depth via shadows, refined micro-interactions. No flashy effects — just intentional, cohesive refinement.

---

## Files to Modify (13 files, CSS-first approach)

### Phase 1: Foundation

**1. `index.html`** — Update font imports
- Replace Inter with **DM Sans** (400, 500, 600) + **JetBrains Mono** (400)
- DM Sans: geometric sans with more character than Inter, excellent small-size readability
- JetBrains Mono: precision monospace for coordinates/measurements (replaces Courier New)

**2. `src/styles/variables.css`** — Replace all design tokens
- **Palette shift**: warm neutrals instead of cold grays
  - Canvas bg: `#FFFFFF` → `#FAFAF8` (warm off-white)
  - Panel bg: `#F9FAFB` → `#F3F3F0` (warm gray)
  - Borders: `#D0D5DD` → `#DDDDD8` (warm border)
  - Text primary: `#1D2939` → `#1A1D23`, secondary: `#667085` → `#6B7080`
- **Accent**: `#2B7FFF` (generic blue) → `#0D7C66` (teal — distinctive, architectural)
- **New tokens**: `--color-text-tertiary`, `--color-surface-elevated`, `--color-border-subtle`, `--color-accent-subtle`, `--color-danger-subtle`
- **Shadow system**: `--shadow-sm`, `--shadow-md`, `--shadow-lg`, `--shadow-overlay`
- **Radii**: sm `4px→5px`, md `6px→8px`, add `--radius-lg: 12px`
- **Transitions**: add `--ease-out`, `--duration-fast`, `--duration-normal`
- **Fonts**: `--font-ui: 'DM Sans'`, `--font-blueprint: 'JetBrains Mono'`

**3. `src/styles/reset.css`** — Add `select { font: inherit; color: inherit; }`

**4. `src/styles/global.css`** — Add polish layers
- Custom thin scrollbars (6px, transparent track, subtle thumb)
- `::selection` highlight in teal tint
- `:focus-visible` with teal outline ring
- `text-rendering: optimizeLegibility`
- Global `input:not([readonly]):focus` and `select:focus` styles (teal border + glow ring)
- Modal keyframe animations (`modalOverlayIn`, `modalDialogIn`)

### Phase 2: Chrome (CSS Module updates)

**5. `src/ui/Toolbar.module.css`** — Refined toolbar
- Subtle `box-shadow` on bottom edge for depth
- Button height `32px→30px`, subtler group separators using `--color-border-subtle`
- Active press: `transform: scale(0.97)` micro-interaction
- Toggle active: teal-tinted background + teal text (instead of plain gray)
- Dirty indicator: `6px` dot with gentle pulse animation
- `letter-spacing: 0.01em` on buttons

**6. `src/ui/Sidebar.module.css`** — Refined sidebar
- Padding `12px→16px`, gap `12px→16px` (more breathing room)
- Section title: `11px→10.5px` with `letter-spacing: 0.06em` (more refined uppercase)
- Count badges: pill-shaped with subtle background (`rgba(0,0,0,0.04)`, `border-radius: 10px`)
- Project name input: focus state with teal border + glow ring
- Selected items: teal-tinted background, `font-weight: 500`
- Section header hover: subtle background highlight
- Item transitions on hover/select

**7. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.module.css`** — Refined properties
- Padding `12px→16px`
- Subtitle gets `border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-subtle)` for section separation
- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em` (tighter tracking for authority)
- Color hex values: use `--font-blueprint` monospace
- Delete button: 30px height, scale micro-interaction
- Unit button hover/active transitions
- `background: white` → `var(--color-surface-elevated)` throughout

**8. `src/app/App.module.css`** — Layout depth
- Canvas area: subtle `inset box-shadow` (makes canvas feel recessed between panels)
- Toolbar: `z-index: 10` (shadow renders above canvas)

**9. `src/renderers/SvgCanvas.module.css`** — Status bar polish
- Height `24px→26px`, gap `16px→24px`, padding to `16px`
- `user-select: none`
- `letter-spacing: 0.02em`
- Subtle `inset box-shadow` at top
- Status message: fade-in-up animation, uses UI font with `font-weight: 500`

### Phase 3: Components (JSX inline style updates)

**10. `src/ui/InputField.jsx`** — Smarter inputs
- Numeric inputs (`type === 'number'`): use `fontFamily: 'var(--font-blueprint)'` for precision alignment
- Suffix: smaller (`10px`), tertiary color, monospace font
- Editable bg: `'var(--color-surface-elevated)'` instead of `'white'`
- Row margin: `8px→6px` for denser property lists

**11. `src/ui/Modal.jsx`** — Premium modal
- Overlay: darker warm black `rgba(10, 12, 15, 0.45)` + `backdropFilter: blur(4px)`
- Dialog: warm bg `#FAFAF8`, `--radius-lg` (12px), `--shadow-overlay`, 1px border
- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em`
- Entry animation via CSS keyframes (scale from 96% + slide up 8px)

**12. `src/app/App.jsx`** — Load modal cards
- Project cards: `--radius-md`, `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg
- Load button: `font-weight: 500`
- Delete button: teal-ified danger tint (`--color-danger-subtle` bg, `--color-danger` text)
- Cancel button: `font-weight: 500`, elevated surface bg

**13. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx`** — Select elements
- All `<select>` inline styles: use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg, CSS variable borders/radii

---

## What Does NOT Change
- All event handlers, state management, business logic
- Layout grid structure (toolbar/sidebar/canvas/properties)
- Component hierarchy, props, rendering logic
- SVG rendering, coordinate systems, tool system
- Keyboard shortcuts, persistence, undo/redo
- Panel collapse behavior

## Verification
1. Run `npm run dev` and visually inspect all panels, toolbar, sidebar, properties
2. Check that DM Sans and JetBrains Mono load correctly
3. Verify teal accent on active toolbar buttons, selected sidebar items, focused inputs
4. Test modal open animation (Load Project dialog)
5. Confirm status bar readability with new monospace font
6. Check custom scrollbar in sidebar/properties when content overflows
7. Verify disabled button states remain visually distinct
8. Test dark-on-teal contrast for accessibility (white on `#0D7C66` ≈ 5.5:1, passes WCAG AA)


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\johnm\.claude\projects\C--Users-johnm-modular-apartment-planner\dbfe6c55-d455-4931-96fd-23a6c2b4a0ef.jsonl

# UI Enhancement Plan: Productivity Platform Aesthetic

## Context
The modular apartment planner has a functional but generic UI (Inter font, standard blue accent, flat white/gray surfaces). The goal is to elevate it to a polished productivity platform feel — simple, calm, and professional — without changing any behavior. Think Linear/Figma-level polish for an architectural tool.

## Design Direction
**Architectural Precision Meets Modern Craft.** Warm-neutral palette, distinctive typography, teal accent color (evokes architectural patina), subtle depth via shadows, refined micro-interactions. No flashy effects — just intentional, cohesive refinement.

---

## Files to Modify (13 files, CSS-first approach)

### Phase 1: Foundation

**1. `index.html`** — Update font imports
- Replace Inter with **DM Sans** (400, 500, 600) + **JetBrains Mono** (400)
- DM Sans: geometric sans with more character than Inter, excellent small-size readability
- JetBrains Mono: precision monospace for coordinates/measurements (replaces Courier New)

**2. `src/styles/variables.css`** — Replace all design tokens
- **Palette shift**: warm neutrals instead of cold grays
  - Canvas bg: `#FFFFFF` → `#FAFAF8` (warm off-white)
  - Panel bg: `#F9FAFB` → `#F3F3F0` (warm gray)
  - Borders: `#D0D5DD` → `#DDDDD8` (warm border)
  - Text primary: `#1D2939` → `#1A1D23`, secondary: `#667085` → `#6B7080`
- **Accent**: `#2B7FFF` (generic blue) → `#0D7C66` (teal — distinctive, architectural)
- **New tokens**: `--color-text-tertiary`, `--color-surface-elevated`, `--color-border-subtle`, `--color-accent-subtle`, `--color-danger-subtle`
- **Shadow system**: `--shadow-sm`, `--shadow-md`, `--shadow-lg`, `--shadow-overlay`
- **Radii**: sm `4px→5px`, md `6px→8px`, add `--radius-lg: 12px`
- **Transitions**: add `--ease-out`, `--duration-fast`, `--duration-normal`
- **Fonts**: `--font-ui: 'DM Sans'`, `--font-blueprint: 'JetBrains Mono'`

**3. `src/styles/reset.css`** — Add `select { font: inherit; color: inherit; }`

**4. `src/styles/global.css`** — Add polish layers
- Custom thin scrollbars (6px, transparent track, subtle thumb)
- `::selection` highlight in teal tint
- `:focus-visible` with teal outline ring
- `text-rendering: optimizeLegibility`
- Global `input:not([readonly]):focus` and `select:focus` styles (teal border + glow ring)
- Modal keyframe animations (`modalOverlayIn`, `modalDialogIn`)

### Phase 2: Chrome (CSS Module updates)

**5. `src/ui/Toolbar.module.css`** — Refined toolbar
- Subtle `box-shadow` on bottom edge for depth
- Button height `32px→30px`, subtler group separators using `--color-border-subtle`
- Active press: `transform: scale(0.97)` micro-interaction
- Toggle active: teal-tinted background + teal text (instead of plain gray)
- Dirty indicator: `6px` dot with gentle pulse animation
- `letter-spacing: 0.01em` on buttons

**6. `src/ui/Sidebar.module.css`** — Refined sidebar
- Padding `12px→16px`, gap `12px→16px` (more breathing room)
- Section title: `11px→10.5px` with `letter-spacing: 0.06em` (more refined uppercase)
- Count badges: pill-shaped with subtle background (`rgba(0,0,0,0.04)`, `border-radius: 10px`)
- Project name input: focus state with teal border + glow ring
- Selected items: teal-tinted background, `font-weight: 500`
- Section header hover: subtle background highlight
- Item transitions on hover/select

**7. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.module.css`** — Refined properties
- Padding `12px→16px`
- Subtitle gets `border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-subtle)` for section separation
- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em` (tighter tracking for authority)
- Color hex values: use `--font-blueprint` monospace
- Delete button: 30px height, scale micro-interaction
- Unit button hover/active transitions
- `background: white` → `var(--color-surface-elevated)` throughout

**8. `src/app/App.module.css`** — Layout depth
- Canvas area: subtle `inset box-shadow` (makes canvas feel recessed between panels)
- Toolbar: `z-index: 10` (shadow renders above canvas)

**9. `src/renderers/SvgCanvas.module.css`** — Status bar polish
- Height `24px→26px`, gap `16px→24px`, padding to `16px`
- `user-select: none`
- `letter-spacing: 0.02em`
- Subtle `inset box-shadow` at top
- Status message: fade-in-up animation, uses UI font with `font-weight: 500`

### Phase 3: Components (JSX inline style updates)

**10. `src/ui/InputField.jsx`** — Smarter inputs
- Numeric inputs (`type === 'number'`): use `fontFamily: 'var(--font-blueprint)'` for precision alignment
- Suffix: smaller (`10px`), tertiary color, monospace font
- Editable bg: `'var(--color-surface-elevated)'` instead of `'white'`
- Row margin: `8px→6px` for denser property lists

**11. `src/ui/Modal.jsx`** — Premium modal
- Overlay: darker warm black `rgba(10, 12, 15, 0.45)` + `backdropFilter: blur(4px)`
- Dialog: warm bg `#FAFAF8`, `--radius-lg` (12px), `--shadow-overlay`, 1px border
- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em`
- Entry animation via CSS keyframes (scale from 96% + slide up 8px)

**12. `src/app/App.jsx`** — Load modal cards
- Project cards: `--radius-md`, `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg
- Load button: `font-weight: 500`
- Delete button: teal-ified danger tint (`--color-danger-subtle` bg, `--color-danger` text)
- Cancel button: `font-weight: 500`, elevated surface bg

**13. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx`** — Select elements
- All `<select>` inline styles: use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg, CSS variable borders/radii

---

## What Does NOT Change
- All event handlers, state management, business logic
- Layout grid structure (toolbar/sidebar/canvas/properties)
- Component hierarchy, props, rendering logic
- SVG rendering, coordinate systems, tool system
- Keyboard shortcuts, persistence, undo/redo
- Panel collapse behavior

## Verification
1. Run `npm run dev` and visually inspect all panels, toolbar, sidebar, properties
2. Check that DM Sans and JetBrains Mono load correctly
3. Verify teal accent on active toolbar buttons, selected sidebar items, focused inputs
4. Test modal open animation (Load Project dialog)
5. Confirm status bar readability with new monospace font
6. Check custom scrollbar in sidebar/properties when content overflows
7. Verify disabled button states remain visually distinct
8. Test dark-on-teal contrast for accessibility (white on `#0D7C66` ≈ 5.5:1, passes WCAG AA)

content.text:
Build succeeds. All 13 files have been updated:

**Phase 1 — Foundation:**
1. `index.html` — Swapped Inter for DM Sans (400/500/600) + JetBrains Mono
2. `variables.css` — Warm palette, teal accent (`#0D7C66`), new tokens (tertiary, surface-elevated, border-subtle, accent-subtle, danger-subtle), shadow system, larger radii, transition variables
3. `reset.css` — Added `select { font: inherit; color: inherit; }`
4. `global.css` — Custom scrollbars, `::selection` teal tint, `:focus-visible` teal ring, global input/select focus glow, modal keyframe animations, `text-rendering: optimizeLegibility`

**Phase 2 — Chrome:**
5. `Toolbar.module.css` — Bottom box-shadow, 30px buttons, subtle group separators, `scale(0.97)` press, teal toggle active state, 6px pulse dot
6. `Sidebar.module.css` — 16px padding/gap, refined section titles (10.5px, 0.06em), pill count badges, elevated surface inputs, teal-tinted selected items, hover transitions
7. `PropertiesPanel.module.css` — 16px padding, subtitle border-top separator, tighter title tracking, monospace color values, 30px delete button with scale, unit button transitions
8. `App.module.css` — Canvas inset shadow, toolbar z-index 10
9. `SvgCanvas.module.css` — 26px status bar, 24px gap, 16px padding, user-select none, top inset shadow, status message fade-in-up with UI font

**Phase 3 — Components:**
10. `InputField.jsx` — Monospace font for number inputs, smaller/tertiary/mono suffix, elevated surface bg, 6px row margin
11. `Modal.jsx` — Warm dark overlay with blur, warm bg, `--radius-lg`, `--shadow-overlay`, border, entry animation
12. `App.jsx` — Project cards with `--radius-md` + elevated bg, load button font-weight, teal-ified delete button, cancel button styling
13. `PropertiesPanel.jsx` — All selects use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` background

     5→

    52→

    95→
    96→**12. `src/app/App.jsx`** — Load modal cards

    98→- Load button: `font-weight: 500`

   100→- Cancel button: `font-weight: 500`, elevated surface bg
   101→
   102→**13. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx`** — Select elements
   103→- All `<select>` inline styles: use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg, CSS variable borders/radii
   104→
   105→---
   106→

file.content:
# UI Enhancement Plan: Productivity Platform Aesthetic

## Context
The modular apartment planner has a functional but generic UI (Inter font, standard blue accent, flat white/gray surfaces). The goal is to elevate it to a polished productivity platform feel — simple, calm, and professional — without changing any behavior. Think Linear/Figma-level polish for an architectural tool.

## Design Direction
**Architectural Precision Meets Modern Craft.** Warm-neutral palette, distinctive typography, teal accent color (evokes architectural patina), subtle depth via shadows, refined micro-interactions. No flashy effects — just intentional, cohesive refinement.

---

## Files to Modify (13 files, CSS-first approach)

### Phase 1: Foundation

**1. `index.html`** — Update font imports
- Replace Inter with **DM Sans** (400, 500, 600) + **JetBrains Mono** (400)
- DM Sans: geometric sans with more character than Inter, excellent small-size readability
- JetBrains Mono: precision monospace for coordinates/measurements (replaces Courier New)

**2. `src/styles/variables.css`** — Replace all design tokens
- **Palette shift**: warm neutrals instead of cold grays
  - Canvas bg: `#FFFFFF` → `#FAFAF8` (warm off-white)
  - Panel bg: `#F9FAFB` → `#F3F3F0` (warm gray)
  - Borders: `#D0D5DD` → `#DDDDD8` (warm border)
  - Text primary: `#1D2939` → `#1A1D23`, secondary: `#667085` → `#6B7080`
- **Accent**: `#2B7FFF` (generic blue) → `#0D7C66` (teal — distinctive, architectural)
- **New tokens**: `--color-text-tertiary`, `--color-surface-elevated`, `--color-border-subtle`, `--color-accent-subtle`, `--color-danger-subtle`
- **Shadow system**: `--shadow-sm`, `--shadow-md`, `--shadow-lg`, `--shadow-overlay`
- **Radii**: sm `4px→5px`, md `6px→8px`, add `--radius-lg: 12px`
- **Transitions**: add `--ease-out`, `--duration-fast`, `--duration-normal`
- **Fonts**: `--font-ui: 'DM Sans'`, `--font-blueprint: 'JetBrains Mono'`

**3. `src/styles/reset.css`** — Add `select { font: inherit; color: inherit; }`

**4. `src/styles/global.css`** — Add polish layers
- Custom thin scrollbars (6px, transparent track, subtle thumb)
- `::selection` highlight in teal tint
- `:focus-visible` with teal outline ring
- `text-rendering: optimizeLegibility`
- Global `input:not([readonly]):focus` and `select:focus` styles (teal border + glow ring)
- Modal keyframe animations (`modalOverlayIn`, `modalDialogIn`)

### Phase 2: Chrome (CSS Module updates)

**5. `src/ui/Toolbar.module.css`** — Refined toolbar
- Subtle `box-shadow` on bottom edge for depth
- Button height `32px→30px`, subtler group separators using `--color-border-subtle`
- Active press: `transform: scale(0.97)` micro-interaction
- Toggle active: teal-tinted background + teal text (instead of plain gray)
- Dirty indicator: `6px` dot with gentle pulse animation
- `letter-spacing: 0.01em` on buttons

**6. `src/ui/Sidebar.module.css`** — Refined sidebar
- Padding `12px→16px`, gap `12px→16px` (more breathing room)
- Section title: `11px→10.5px` with `letter-spacing: 0.06em` (more refined uppercase)
- Count badges: pill-shaped with subtle background (`rgba(0,0,0,0.04)`, `border-radius: 10px`)
- Project name input: focus state with teal border + glow ring
- Selected items: teal-tinted background, `font-weight: 500`
- Section header hover: subtle background highlight
- Item transitions on hover/select

**7. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.module.css`** — Refined properties
- Padding `12px→16px`
- Subtitle gets `border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-subtle)` for section separation
- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em` (tighter tracking for authority)
- Color hex values: use `--font-blueprint` monospace
- Delete button: 30px height, scale micro-interaction
- Unit button hover/active transitions
- `background: white` → `var(--color-surface-elevated)` throughout

**8. `src/app/App.module.css`** — Layout depth
- Canvas area: subtle `inset box-shadow` (makes canvas feel recessed between panels)
- Toolbar: `z-index: 10` (shadow renders above canvas)

**9. `src/renderers/SvgCanvas.module.css`** — Status bar polish
- Height `24px→26px`, gap `16px→24px`, padding to `16px`
- `user-select: none`
- `letter-spacing: 0.02em`
- Subtle `inset box-shadow` at top
- Status message: fade-in-up animation, uses UI font with `font-weight: 500`

### Phase 3: Components (JSX inline style updates)

**10. `src/ui/InputField.jsx`** — Smarter inputs
- Numeric inputs (`type === 'number'`): use `fontFamily: 'var(--font-blueprint)'` for precision alignment
- Suffix: smaller (`10px`), tertiary color, monospace font
- Editable bg: `'var(--color-surface-elevated)'` instead of `'white'`
- Row margin: `8px→6px` for denser property lists

**11. `src/ui/Modal.jsx`** — Premium modal
- Overlay: darker warm black `rgba(10, 12, 15, 0.45)` + `backdropFilter: blur(4px)`
- Dialog: warm bg `#FAFAF8`, `--radius-lg` (12px), `--shadow-overlay`, 1px border
- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em`
- Entry animation via CSS keyframes (scale from 96% + slide up 8px)

**12. `src/app/App.jsx`** — Load modal cards
- Project cards: `--radius-md`, `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg
- Load button: `font-weight: 500`
- Delete button: teal-ified danger tint (`--color-danger-subtle` bg, `--color-danger` text)
- Cancel button: `font-weight: 500`, elevated surface bg

**13. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx`** — Select elements
- All `<select>` inline styles: use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg, CSS variable borders/radii

---

## What Does NOT Change
- All event handlers, state management, business logic
- Layout grid structure (toolbar/sidebar/canvas/properties)
- Component hierarchy, props, rendering logic
- SVG rendering, coordinate systems, tool system
- Keyboard shortcuts, persistence, undo/redo
- Panel collapse behavior

## Verification
1. Run `npm run dev` and visually inspect all panels, toolbar, sidebar, properties
2. Check that DM Sans and JetBrains Mono load correctly
3. Verify teal accent on active toolbar buttons, selected sidebar items, focused inputs
4. Test modal open animation (Load Project dialog)
5. Confirm status bar readability with new monospace font
6. Check custom scrollbar in sidebar/properties when content overflows
7. Verify disabled button states remain visually distinct
8. Test dark-on-teal contrast for accessibility (white on `#0D7C66` ≈ 5.5:1, passes WCAG AA)

content.text: This is a different, simple task — the toolbar overflows at narrow widths. Let me update the plan file and exit.

content.content: The file C:\Users\johnm\.claude\plans\smooth-wiggling-popcorn.md has been updated successfully.

lines: -# UI Enhancement Plan: Productivity Platform Aesthetic

-The modular apartment planner has a functional but generic UI (Inter font, standard blue accent, flat white/gray surfaces). The goal is to elevate it to a polished productivity platform feel — simple, calm, and professional — without changing any behavior. Think Linear/Figma-level polish for an architectural tool.

+The toolbar (`.toolbar` in `src/ui/Toolbar.module.css`) uses `display: flex` with many button groups. When the window is narrow, the content overflows and buttons are clipped/hidden since there's no scroll mechanism.

-**Architectural Precision Meets Modern Craft.** Warm-neutral palette, distinctive typography, teal accent color (evokes architectural patina), subtle depth via shadows, refined micro-interactions. No flashy effects — just intentional, cohesive refinement.

+Add `overflow-x: auto` to the `.toolbar` class so it scrolls horizontally when content overflows. Also add `flex-shrink: 0` on `.group` to prevent groups from compressing, and hide the scrollbar for a clean look (the global thin scrollbar styles will apply, but we can make it even more minimal).
-## Files to Modify (13 files, CSS-first approach)
-- DM Sans: geometric sans with more character than Inter, excellent small-size readability
-- JetBrains Mono: precision monospace for coordinates/measurements (replaces Courier New)
-- **Palette shift**: warm neutrals instead of cold grays
-- Custom thin scrollbars (6px, transparent track, subtle thumb)
-- Global `input:not([readonly]):focus` and `select:focus` styles (teal border + glow ring)
-- Subtle `box-shadow` on bottom edge for depth
-- Button height `32px→30px`, subtler group separators using `--color-border-subtle`
-- Toggle active: teal-tinted background + teal text (instead of plain gray)
-- Dirty indicator: `6px` dot with gentle pulse animation
-- Count badges: pill-shaped with subtle background (`rgba(0,0,0,0.04)`, `border-radius: 10px`)
-- Project name input: focus state with teal border + glow ring
-- Section header hover: subtle background highlight
-- Subtitle gets `border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-subtle)` for section separation
-- Canvas area: subtle `inset box-shadow` (makes canvas feel recessed between panels)
-- Status message: fade-in-up animation, uses UI font with `font-weight: 500`
-- Numeric inputs (`type === 'number'`): use `fontFamily: 'var(--font-blueprint)'` for precision alignment
-- Suffix: smaller (`10px`), tertiary color, monospace font
-- Row margin: `8px→6px` for denser property lists
-- Entry animation via CSS keyframes (scale from 96% + slide up 8px)
-- Delete button: teal-ified danger tint (`--color-danger-subtle` bg, `--color-danger` text)
-- All `<select>` inline styles: use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg, CSS variable borders/radii
-- All event handlers, state management, business logic
-- SVG rendering, coordinate systems, tool system
-1. Run `npm run dev` and visually inspect all panels, toolbar, sidebar, properties
-2. Check that DM Sans and JetBrains Mono load correctly
-3. Verify teal accent on active toolbar buttons, selected sidebar items, focused inputs
-4. Test modal open animation (Load Project dialog)
-5. Confirm status bar readability with new monospace font
-6. Check custom scrollbar in sidebar/properties when content overflows
-7. Verify disabled button states remain visually distinct
-8. Test dark-on-teal contrast for accessibility (white on `#0D7C66` ≈ 5.5:1, passes WCAG AA)
+1. Run `npm run dev`, resize the browser window narrower than toolbar content width
+2. Confirm toolbar scrolls horizontally instead of clipping
+3. Confirm scrollbar appearance is subtle (thin scrollbar from global styles)
+4. Confirm no layout shift — toolbar height stays fixed at `--toolbar-height`

- Title: `letter-spacing: -0.01em`
- Entry animation via CSS keyframes (scale from 96% + slide up 8px)

**12. `src/app/App.jsx`** — Load modal cards
- Project cards: `--radius-md`, `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg
- Load button: `font-weight: 500`
- Delete button: teal-ified danger tint (`--color-danger-subtle` bg, `--color-danger` text)
- Cancel button: `font-weight: 500`, elevated surface bg

**13. `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx`** — Select elements
- All `<select>` inline styles: use `var(--color-surface-elevated)` bg, CSS variable borders/radii

---

## What Does NOT Change
- All event handlers, state management, business logic
- Layout grid structure (toolbar/sidebar/canvas/properties)
- Component hierarchy, props, rendering logic
- SVG rendering, coordinate systems, tool system
- Keyboard shortcuts, persistence, undo/redo
- Panel collapse behavior

## Verification
1. Run `npm run dev` and visually inspect all panels, toolbar, sidebar, properties
2. Check that DM Sans and JetBrains Mono load correctly
3. Verify teal accent on active toolbar buttons, selected sidebar items, focused inputs
4. Test modal open animation (Load Project dialog)
5. Confirm status bar readability with new monospace font
6. Check custom scrollbar in sidebar/properties when content overflows
7. Verify disabled button states remain visually distinct
8. Test dark-on-teal contrast for accessibility (white on `#0D7C66` ≈ 5.5:1, passes WCAG AA)

content.text: Simple CSS-only fix — add `overflow-x: auto` to `.toolbar` and `flex-shrink: 0` to `.group` so button groups don't compress and the toolbar scrolls horizontally instead.
